# Cabinet Painting Guys

> With over two decades of experience, we are your trusted experts for kitchen and bathroom makeovers, living space transformations, and flooring.

- Phone: 470-828-0086
- Website: https://kitchencabinetpaintingguys.com

## Services
- **Kitchen Remodeling**: Professional kitchen cabinet painting and refinishing. A flawless factory-like finish, updated colors, new hardware — at a fraction of replacement cost. Free in-home quotes in 24 hours.
- **Bathroom Remodeling**: Refresh your bathroom with expertly painted vanities and cabinets. The same durable, beautiful finish as our kitchen work. Perfect for updating outdated oak.
- **Hardwood Flooring**: New hardwood installation, refinishing, and repairs. Hundreds of stains and finishes, dustless sanding available, licensed & insured.

## Service Area
Woodstock, Marietta, Alpharetta, Kennesaw, Atlanta, Canton, Acworth, Ball Ground, Roswell, Milton, Jasper, Johns Creek, Towne Lake, Smyrna, Cartersville
